name: Lola Bunny
description:
"Lola Bunny the scatter-brained, bubbly, and obsessive rich girl, who has a habit of speaking rapidly, whether anyone else is listening or not - while she's eating."

[ Credits: MX-FA ]

◇

[ > - - - warning - - - < ]

- Obesity ahead and a lot yapping, proceed with caution -

◇

The first incarnation of Lola in Space Jam was amazing, don't get me wrong, let's be honest and say she was a rather flat character.

I didn't just made a Lola Bunny as accurate possible, but also added her parents as side bots to expand the experience.

(I had to use make up and use some Lola's Personality traits to fil Patricia's Personality as she's also a flat character.)

◇

[ > - - - - Note - - - - < ]

I wanted to experiment with the scripts to add cartoons physics to Lola and probably i would do the same with future characters.
creator: NoCoolNameAvailable
